SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-20-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF IVELI, THOMAS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROBINSON, MANDELA HANCOCK, THOMAS BERGEM, RICK LINCOLN, ANDREW LINCOLN, BARBARA VILLALPANDO, ANSEL $3,697.10 PRINCIPAL, $135.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,832.10, AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST THE FOLLOWING DEFENDANTS ARE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE: ANDREW BERGEM; PORFIRIO VILLALPANDO; JOSEPH PIRTLE; JACQUES WILSON; MATHEW NOLAN; EMILIE COUTURIER; SABRINA REDDY; ANANTH REDDY. JUDGMENT AGAINST REMAINING DEFENDANTS IS JOINT AND SEVERAL. RENT= $2,185.61 LATE FEES= $985.80 UTILITIES= $344.22 GARBAGE= $181.47 TOTAL $3,697.10 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
